rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ESTATE OF ERNEST BLOOMFIELD TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
rulings.Rulings: Continued to February 25, 2014 for notice. The "Supplement" filed on 1/24/14 actually amends the petition as it substitues a different sales and purchase agreement for the original agreement. An amendment to a petition in a trust requires a full 30 days notice, which notice period will be complete by 2/25/14. No later than Wednesday, February 19, 2014, Counsel must deliver an endorsed filed hard copy of the first and second supplement to this Examiner in Room 202.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ANDERSON D. WARD
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Final/Complete Inventory And Appraisal
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Although inventories were filed, they were only signed by two of the three personal representatives. It is noted the substitution of attorney was only for two of the three personal representatives. Counsel may be asked to explain. In addition, no bank statements were filed in support of the cash balanaces as of the date of death, required in this case as communicated to the former attorney. Finally, Counsel will be asked to address how co-administrators were able to obtain the assets given the language in the Letters that states they may not take control of assets absent further court order.
